action: Hold core; selective adds allowed only at ruled zones.

factors.name: Price trend
factors.why: SPX location versus 50D and 200D defines the primary regime.

factors.name: Volatility
factors.why: VIX confirms or contradicts the price trend.

factors.name: Momentum
factors.why: RSI tells whether trend is overextended or losing pressure.

factors.name: MACD
factors.why: MACD supports momentum direction and trend persistence.

factors.name: Rates
factors.why: 10Y yield pressure constrains valuation multiples, especially growth.

factors.name: Growth proxy
factors.why: QQQ confirms whether index strength is growth-led or broad-market only.

factors.name: Market tape
factors.why: Live tape checks whether external market pressure confirms the chart.
